title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudomaculosum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudomaculosum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudomaculosum can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
